name: katchup
description: 1. In `backend/.env`, set Google + Supabase keys and keep these local URLs:    - `GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/callback`    - `FRONTEND_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000`    - `FRONTEND_REDIRECT=http://localhost:3000/schedule.html` 2. Start backend:    - `cd backend`    - `npm install`    - `npm run dev` 3. Open `http://localhost:3000/schedule.html`.
